title: moogs_structures:versioned_single_pool_element
description: A custom template pool element that resolves different structure templates based on the running Minecraft version.

location.description: Fallback namespaced resource location pointing to an NBT structure file (e.g. 'mymod:village/house'). Used when no version-specific entry in 'locations' matches.

locations.description: Version-ranged structure template locations. Keys are either a single version ('1.21') or an inclusive range ('1.21-1.21.1'). Values are namespaced resource locations pointing to NBT files.

processors.description: Processor list applied to the structure template. Follows vanilla single_pool_element processor list format.

projection.description: How the structure is placed relative to terrain. 'rigid' places it at a fixed height; 'terrain_matching' conforms to the ground.

override_liquid_settings.description: Controls whether liquid waterlogging is applied when placing the structure.
